## Source: amazon-inspector (5a6a92aff7b9a6be04f3050f1895e2d53e77dd8c9eba110c970ab59c7d003d81)
The package windowston was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (4a08e5f1944c2b5bdbe9400d35ce02a4ecdeff048b5a2dce5309b8a3c48dc9b7)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'windowston' @ 3.19.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
